summary: Implemented geas schema command group with two subcommands (list, template). Created schema-template.ts with recursive schema walking, ref resolution (external _defs and self-refs), required-only field inclusion, conditional schema merge for evidence roles, and depth guard. Created commands/schema.ts with list and template subcommands. Modified main.ts to register the new command group. All 7 verification tests pass: list returns 15 sorted schema names, template generates correct fill-in JSON for task-contract/evidence/record, role-specific conditional fields merge correctly for all 4 evidence roles, and unknown schema types return structured errors.
